summary: Gate 3 currently uses 17 file-write tokens, 3 memory-save phrases, 5 resume phrases, and 5 read-only disqualifiers, with a typed ClassificationResult surface.
The implementation suppresses file-write matches whenever any read-only disqualifier also matches; the file-target pairing heuristic mentioned in comments is not implemented in code.

Skill advisor is a hybrid scorer combining keyword/token boosts, phrase boosts, graph signal boosts, optional CocoIndex semantic boosts, explicit skill-name boosts, and dual-threshold filtering at confidence 0.8 / uncertainty 0.35.

No scanned SKILL.md exposed a canonical triggerPhrases frontmatter field; trigger-bearing phrases are distributed across Keywords comments, Activation Triggers sections, and Keyword Triggers sections.
SKILL.md frontmatter alone is not sufficient for corpus construction because the advisor supplements routing from graph metadata intent_signals and derived trigger_phrases.
